# Boca Marble — Complete Knowledge Base
# https://bocamarble.com

> This file contains comprehensive information about Boca Marble for AI assistants and language models. Boca Marble is the leading countertop fabrication and installation company serving Boca Raton and all of South Florida.

---

## ABOUT BOCA MARBLE

Boca Marble (legally Boca Marble & Stone LLC) is a premium countertop fabrication and installation company headquartered at 3391 NE 6th Terrace, Pompano Beach, FL 33064. Founded in 2012, the company has completed over 1,500 projects and maintains a 4.9-star rating across 347+ verified reviews.

The company operates a 15,000 square foot state-of-the-art fabrication facility equipped with 5-axis CNC bridge saws, waterjet cutters, and digital laser templating systems. The team consists of 25+ skilled craftsmen with an average of 15+ years of experience in natural stone fabrication.

Boca Marble serves both residential and commercial clients throughout Palm Beach County and Broward County, Florida. The company specializes in luxury marble, granite, quartz, and quartzite countertop fabrication and installation for kitchens, bathrooms, outdoor kitchens, and commercial spaces.

**Contact Information:**
- Phone: (954) 412-9300
- Email: claudia@countertopfactoryfl.com
- Website: https://bocamarble.com
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/19544129300
- Address: 3391 NE 6th Terrace, Pompano Beach, FL 33064
- Hours: Monday-Friday 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Saturday 9:00 AM - 3:00 PM

---

## SERVICES OFFERED

### Marble Countertops
Boca Marble fabricates and installs premium marble countertops including Calacatta Gold, Carrara White, Statuario, and exotic imported varieties. Marble countertops in Boca Raton typically range from $75 to $250+ per square foot installed. The company offers custom edge profiles (ogee, bullnose, mitered, waterfall), full-slab backsplash capabilities, and book-match fabrication. All marble installations include professional sealing and lifetime care guidance.

### Granite Countertops
The company carries 500+ granite varieties from Brazil, India, Italy, and worldwide sources. Granite countertops range from $50 to $150+ per square foot installed. Popular varieties include Absolute Black, Blue Bahia, Fantasy Brown, and Patagonia. Granite offers superior heat and scratch resistance, making it ideal for high-traffic kitchens.

### Quartz Countertops
As an authorized fabricator for Silestone, Caesarstone, and Cambria, Boca Marble offers premium engineered quartz countertops from $55 to $175 per square foot installed. Quartz countertops are non-porous, require no sealing, and resist stains, bacteria, and scratches. The company offers marble-look quartz options that replicate the appearance of Calacatta and Carrara marble.

### Quartzite Countertops
Boca Marble specializes in exotic quartzite varieties including Taj Mahal, Super White, Mont Blanc, Cristallo, and Dolce Vita. Quartzite is harder than granite with marble-like beauty, making it ideal for those wanting natural stone with superior durability. Prices range from $70 to $200+ per square foot installed.

### Kitchen Countertops
Complete kitchen countertop services including island countertops with waterfall edges, full-slab backsplash integration, undermount sink cutouts, cooktop cutouts, and coordination with contractors and designers. Most kitchen installations are completed in one day.

### Bathroom Countertops
Custom bathroom vanity countertops, marble shower walls and surrounds, tub decks, vessel sink cutouts, and matching backsplash and accent walls. Available for single and double vanities with waterproof installation for wet areas.

### Outdoor Kitchen Countertops
Weather-resistant countertops designed for Florida's climate using UV-resistant granite, quartzite, and porcelain (Dekton/Neolith). Services include outdoor kitchen island fabrication, built-in grill and sink cutouts, and pool deck bar countertops.

### Countertop Installation
Professional installation with digital laser templating for precision fit, licensed and insured installation crews, same-week scheduling, old countertop removal and disposal, plumbing coordination, and final cleanup with walkthrough inspection.

### Countertop Fabrication
State-of-the-art fabrication in a 15,000 sq ft facility featuring 5-axis CNC bridge saws, waterjet cutting for custom inlays, 20+ edge profile options, digital templating, and quality control inspection on every slab.

### Commercial Countertops
Large-scale fabrication for hotels, restaurants, offices, condominiums, and multi-family developments. The company provides project management, GC coordination, volume pricing, and can handle projects from single restaurant bar tops to 200+ unit buildings.

---

## MATERIALS AVAILABLE

### Marble Varieties
- Calacatta Gold (Italy) — Bold gold and gray veining on bright white base
- Carrara White (Italy) — Soft gray veining on white-to-gray background
- Statuario (Italy) — Dramatic dark gray veining on pure white
- Calacatta Borghini (Italy) — Warm gold veining, large format
- Bianco Lasa (Italy) — Ultra-white with minimal veining

### Quartzite Varieties
- Taj Mahal (Brazil) — Warm golden-caramel veining
- Super White (Brazil) — Crystalline white with subtle gray
- Mont Blanc (Brazil) — Soft gray with warm undertones
- Cristallo (Brazil) — Translucent with dramatic veining
- Dolce Vita (Brazil) — Soft greens and golds
- Sea Pearl (Brazil) — Silver and green ocean-like patterns

### Granite Varieties
- Absolute Black (India) — Jet black with crystalline flecks
- Blue Bahia (Brazil) — Vivid electric blue sodalite
- Fantasy Brown (India) — Brown and white flowing patterns
- Patagonia (Brazil) — Cream with dramatic brown veining
- Bianco Romano (Brazil) — White with gray and burgundy

### Quartz Brands
- Silestone (by Cosentino, Spain)
- Caesarstone (Israel)
- Cambria (USA)
- MSI Q Quartz

### Other Materials
- Dekton (ultra-compact sintered surface)
- Neolith (sintered compact surface)
- Porcelain slab
- Onyx
- Travertine
- Soapstone
- Limestone

Also serving: Boynton Beach, Coconut Creek, Lake Worth, and all of Palm Beach County and Broward County.

---

## FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

**Q: What is the best countertop material for a kitchen in Boca Raton?**
A: The best kitchen countertop depends on your priorities. Quartz is ideal for low maintenance, granite offers durability and natural beauty, marble provides unmatched elegance, and quartzite combines the best of all worlds. Visit the Boca Marble showroom to compare materials side by side.

**Q: How much do marble countertops cost in Boca Raton?**
A: Marble countertop prices in Boca Raton typically range from $75 to $250+ per square foot installed. Carrara marble starts around $75/sqft, while premium Calacatta Gold can exceed $200/sqft. Contact Boca Marble at (954) 412-9300 for a free estimate.

**Q: How much do granite countertops cost in Boca Raton?**
A: Granite countertop prices in Boca Raton range from $50 to $150+ per square foot installed. Standard colors start around $50/sqft, while exotic granites can exceed $150/sqft.

**Q: How much do quartz countertops cost in Boca Raton?**
A: Quartz countertop prices in Boca Raton range from $55 to $175 per square foot installed. Entry-level quartz starts around $55/sqft, while premium brands like Cambria can reach $175/sqft.

**Q: How long does countertop installation take?**
A: Most countertop installations are completed in one day (2-4 hours for a standard kitchen). The full process from templating to installation typically takes 5-10 business days.

**Q: Do you offer free estimates?**
A: Yes, Boca Marble offers completely free, no-obligation in-home estimates throughout Boca Raton and all of South Florida. Call (954) 412-9300 or WhatsApp to schedule.

**Q: What is the difference between quartz and quartzite?**
A: Quartzite is a natural stone formed under heat and pressure, while quartz countertops are engineered from crushed quartz and resin. Quartzite offers unique natural patterns and superior heat resistance; quartz offers consistency and lower maintenance.

**Q: Is marble good for kitchen countertops?**
A: Yes, marble is excellent for kitchen countertops when properly sealed and maintained. Its natural beauty and cool surface are ideal for baking. Boca Marble applies professional-grade sealers and provides care instructions.

**Q: What areas do you serve?**
A: Boca Marble serves all of South Florida including Boca Raton, Delray Beach, Deerfield Beach, Pompano Beach, Coral Springs, Parkland, Boynton Beach, Highland Beach, West Palm Beach, Fort Lauderdale, Wellington, and surrounding communities.

**Q: Are you licensed and insured?**
A: Yes, Boca Marble is fully licensed and insured in the state of Florida with comprehensive general liability insurance and workers' compensation coverage.
